[Strictly Internal—非公开] Board Memorandum re Project Jade Crane (deal codename) for Blue Harbor Microsystems Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91H0A0000T9L56Q2XM, fictional).
Proposed acquisition of a 21.5% equity interest in Riverpeak New Energy Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91F2X0000K8W123Q7Y, fictional) for approximately RMB 1.2 billion; signing of the definitive Share Purchase Agreement targeted for 2026-06-28, long-stop 2026-10-31.
Embargo: IR draft must not be released before 2026-07-15 09:00 CST; issuer obligations under CSRC and SSE listing rules apply during the 静默期 and blackout windows.
Inside information handling: maintain an “内幕信息知情人” list; only refer to the transaction using the codename; circulate materials via the sealed data room; do not email summaries outside legal/compliance.
MAC/MAE: parties acknowledge that sector index volatility, seasonal demand shifts, or pandemics shall not constitute a Material Adverse Effect (negated MAC); closing is conditioned on no MAE arising from target-specific compliance failures.
Regulatory pathways: CSRC major asset reorg review not triggered; SAMR simple case antitrust filing likely; NDRC foreign debt filing none; CAC cross-border data transfer security assessment required for any export of R&D telemetry or HR files (PIPL/CSL/DSL).
Employment workflow note: onboarding records for Ms. Zhao Qing (Resid ID: CN-FIC-44000019991212001X, fictional) must be masked before any cross-border processing; no data relating to minors under 14 is collected in this project.
Data minimization: collect only necessary personal information; encrypt resident ID scans; store domestically; if engaging Singapore analytics vendor, execute SCCs and complete CAC申报 prior to transfer.
Financing: mix of internal cash and a committed RMB term facility; covenants include financial reporting under PRC GAAP and “no dividend leakage” before closing; hedging plan to be approved by Treasury.
Draft IR paragraph (for later use): Blue Harbor intends to deepen strategic cooperation with Riverpeak to accelerate storage-inverter integration; this draft is non-binding and for investor-relations use after embargo.
Checklist (excerpt): final term sheet v5, SPA, disclosure schedule, employee retention plan, STAR Market issuer counsel comfort, cyber and data mapping, MOFCOM foreign investment reporting (if any), SSE filing of board resolutions.
Public-source reference: see publicly available CSRC Circular [2024] No. 12 on standardized disclosures; templates therein are for reference only and do not reveal any non-public transaction terms.
Research note to board: preliminary synergy estimate RMB 86 million annual run-rate by FY2028; sensitivity at +/- 200 bps gross margin; valuation assumes 14.0x FY2026 EBITA under base case.
Lowercase pm: todo move slides to shared drive, lock the data room, and schedule dd calls; also please park the friday spa-day idea in the social channel.
Issuer compliance: as an A-share issuer, the company must pre-clear any interviews and wechat posts with the exchange; no selective disclosure to analysts or suppliers before T-0.
Contact: Mr. Han Yichen, General Counsel, han.yichen@blueharbor.example; compliance desk: compliance@riverpeak.example; questions on CSL/DSL to Ms. Lin, DPO.
